## Meeting purpose

[Discuss Marcel Santilli's career journey and explore potential collaboration opportunities with Eli Rubel.](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel recently launched a successful AI-powered marketing agency, reaching $105K MRR in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Both discussed challenges and lessons learned in agency management, particularly around client expectations and hiring strategies](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Explored ideas for collaborative events and content creation, focusing on bringing together influential marketers](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Shared insights on leveraging AI for marketing workflows and client onboarding processes](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Career Journey and New Venture

  - [Experienced challenging situations at previous companies (Hashicorp, Service Now, Skillz AI)](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Launched workshops teaching AI-powered marketing techniques](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [New agency grew to $105K MRR with 13 clients in 3 months](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Recently informed current employer (DeepGram) of departure to focus on the new venture](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

### Agency Management Insights

  - [Importance of setting clear boundaries with clients on service offerings](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Value of hiring a project management leader early to systematize processes](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Pros and cons of hiring US-based vs. offshore talent](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Success with nearshore model, particularly in Latin America, due to strong work ethic and company loyalty](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)

### AI-Powered Marketing Strategies

  - [Developed efficient workflows for tasks like competitor analysis and keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Example: For Reddit, scraped 5,500 competitor pages, identified 55,000 keyword opportunities, and scored relevance in 24 hours](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Creating reusable workflows that can be applied across multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)

### Marketer Community Building

  - [Discussed idea for gathering influential marketers for an off-the-record event](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Potential location: Eli's cabin near Rocky Mountain National Park](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Aim to create a space for open, vulnerable conversations among marketing leaders](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Exploring ways to make such events more accessible and inclusive](https://fathom.video/share/TDFqCmDaM5UFQs1_3_WBT-Jfj5ojFaiz?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
